releaseNotes:
Release v0.8.0

New Features:
- In-app AI Assistant — BYOK chat panel with streaming, tool cards with tiered approvals, ghost-overlay edit previews, per-graph history, and Studio-plan license gating (PS-134)
- MCP server foundation — 35 tools over Streamable HTTP plus a stdio bridge sidecar for Claude Desktop / Cursor / ChatGPT (PS-132)
- MCP write & deploy tools — create/edit graphs and nodes, deploy, fire triggers (PS-133)
- MCP subgraph & loop tools (PS-140)
- MCP custom Python node tools (PS-141)
- MCP cross-graph search & solution-awareness tools (PS-142)
- MCP UI channel — live editor state, refresh_graph, get_selected_nodes, get_active_graph, get_open_tabs (PS-142)
- Filesystem Access controls — path-policy gating across file, archive, cloud, script, image, mesh, parser, and git actions; first-launch prompt and Settings panel to manage allowed paths (PS-139)
- AI Provider settings — provider presets, vault keys, model picker, validation (PS-134)
- Sticky search filter in Settings (PS-139)

Improvements:
- Unified settings save path; dropped per-section filesystem commands (PS-139)
- Embed nodes.generated.json; harden add_node / custom-node paths (PS-132)
- User-facing MCP integration PDF covering all 35 tools (PS-132)
